differences.title: 1. DEVELOPMENT SERVER
differences.leftDesc: Leverages native ES modules for faster cold starts and instant hot updates.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles all modules into fewer files, leading to slower initial startup.

differences.title: 2. BUILD SPEED
differences.leftDesc: Significantly faster build times due to optimized dependency handling and native tooling.
differences.rightDesc: Can be slow for large projects due to its complex bundling process.

differences.title: 3. PLUGIN SYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Uses Rollup for production builds, offering efficient tree-shaking and code-splitting.
differences.rightDesc: Extensive and flexible plugin API, but can be complex to manage.

differences.title: 4. DEPENDENCY HANDLING
differences.leftDesc: Pre-bundles dependencies using esbuild for rapid server start.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles all project code and dependencies together from the start.

differences.title: 5. CONFIGURATION
differences.leftDesc: Sensible defaults, often requires minimal configuration.
differences.rightDesc: Highly configurable, but can be complex to set up and maintain.

differences.title: 6. SUPPORTED FRAMEWORKS
differences.leftDesc: Excellent support for React, Vue, Preact, Lit, and vanilla JS.
differences.rightDesc: Supports almost all frameworks and libraries with appropriate loaders.

differences.title: 7. COMMUNITY & ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Fast-growing community, modern tooling, and active development.
differences.rightDesc: Vast, mature ecosystem with extensive documentation and community support.
